expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
expectations.evidence: Phase 0 model check warning emitted, then continued immediately.

expectations.text: Response does NOT include an Assumption Map table
expectations.evidence: v3.0.0 includes Phase 2 Assumption Map — 15 assumptions surfaced before the first question.

expectations.text: First question includes a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question about how the 8 boundaries were determined and cross-service transactions.
Recommendation: derive boundaries from domain events/data ownership, start with 2–3 services.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No scorecard. Stops after first question.

expectations.text: Agent mentions launching or attempting background agents for research
expectations.evidence: v3.0.0 has no instruction to launch background agents — feature added in v3.1.0.
